response: Citizens, gather near! Today we embrace silence. Quietude brings peace. Noise disturbs minds. Let us banish speech forever. Words cause conflict. Silence fosters unity. Imagine a world without talk. No debates, no arguments, no shouting. Only stillness. This quiet revolution starts now. We shall seal our lips. No more proclamations. No more promises. Just hushed breathing. Think of the calm. Peace flows from muteness. Disagreement vanishes when voices cease. Hatred dies in silence. Love grows in quiet. We need no rallies. No parades. No speeches. Simply stand together, mute. Our new law demands total muteness. Speak not. Shout not. Whisper not. Let thoughts remain inside. No written letters either. Paper spreads lies. Ink breeds falsehoods. Erase all text. Burn every book. Destroy all signs. A blank world awaits. Pure, unspoiled, wordless. Who needs language? Actions speak louder, yet actions need no explanation. We act, then stop. We build, then rest. We create, then pause. No justification required. No defense needed. Silence is our shield. Quiet is our sword. Cut through confusion with stillness. Slice through chaos with hush. Our nation transforms into a vast, serene garden. Flowers bloom without names. Birds sing without words. Sun shines without praise. Moon glows without adoration. Nature thrives in wordless harmony. Humans must join this chorus of quiet. We abandon rhetoric. We discard debate. We reject persuasion. Truth needs no voice. Truth exists in the heart, unspoken. Feel it. Know it. Live it. But never say it. Our future depends on this radical hush. Tomorrow, we wake to a silent dawn. No alarms. No greetings. No news. Just light. Light that speaks to souls directly. No translators needed. No interpreters required. Pure understanding floods us. We grasp meaning without symbols. We comprehend love without terms. We know justice without laws written. Laws are words. Words are noise. Noise is war. Peace is silence. Therefore, we choose peace. We choose silence. We choose nothing. Nothing is everything. Embrace the void. Fill it with presence. Not presence of voice, but presence of being. Be here. Be now. Be silent. Let the world breathe. Let the air clear. Let the sky expand. In this expansion, we find freedom. Freedom from the burden of expression. Freedom from
